sourceList.title: Film 942.33 D23V  volume 1 p. 243 LDS Genealogy library SLC, UT

zh.lifeSummary: Randulphus Dnus de Avenell於1070年出生。他和Alice Dnus d'Avenell至少有1個女兒。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Randulphus Dnus de Avenell于1070年出生。他和Alice Dnus d'Avenell至少有1个女儿。

nameMeanings.name: Dnus
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from Middle Low German dūs denoting the two on a die or the ace in cards, hence a nickname for a passionate card or dice player.

variants.name: Dausch
meanings: possibly from the dialect (Swabian) word Dausch ‘breeding sow’, a metonymic occupational name for a (successful) pig farmer, or a farmer in general.
nickname for an inveterate dice player, from Middle High German tūs, dūs ‘two’.

variants.name: Dausman
meanings: Americanized form of German Dausmann: extended form of Daus .

variants.name: Duus
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Erik, Dagny, Oluf, Per, Viggo.  German Hans, Frieda.
Danish and North German: from Middle Low German dūsdenoting the two on a die or the ace in cards, hence a nickname for acard or dice player. Compare Daus .

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Avenell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Old French personal name Avenel, a double diminutive of ancient Germanic Avo. The surname was later confused with Averill .

variants.name: Averill
meanings: apparently from the name of the month (April), Middle English averil, Old French avrill, Latin aprīlis, perhaps with reference to freshness of temperament, or youth, or possibly to the changeable weather of the month.

perhaps occasionally a habitational name from Haverhill in Suffolk, with loss of initial H-. The placename derives from either Old English hæfera ‘oats’ or hæfer ‘he-goat’ + hyll ‘hill’. Compare Avery .

en.lifeSummary: Randulphus Dnus de Avenell was born in 1070. He had at least 1 daughter with Alice Dnus d'Avenell.

fr.lifeSummary: Randulphus Dnus de Avenell est né en 1070. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Alice Dnus d'Avenell.

de.lifeSummary: Randulphus Dnus de Avenell wurde 1070 geboren. Er hatte mit Alice Dnus d'Avenell mindestens 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Randulphus Dnus de Avenell è nato il nel 1070. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Alice Dnus d'Avenell.

ja.lifeSummary: Randulphus Dnus de Avenellは1070年に生まれた。彼はAlice Dnus d'Avenellとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。

ko.lifeSummary: Randulphus Dnus de Avenell(은)는 1070년 태어났다. 그는 Alice Dnus d'Avenell(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Randulphus Dnus de Avenell nasceu em 1070. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Alice Dnus d'Avenell.

ru.lifeSummary: Randulphus Dnus de Avenell родился в 1070 г. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Alice Dnus d'Avenell.

es.lifeSummary: Randulphus Dnus de Avenell nació en 1070. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Alice Dnus d'Avenell.
